tests.name: workspace analysis database cache returns an empty cache when the repo database does not exist yet
workspace analysis database cache persists and reloads file analysis entries from .codegraphy/graph.lbug
workspace analysis database cache skips persistence when the workspace root no longer exists
workspace analysis database cache supports repeated save and load cycles without corrupting the repo-local database
workspace analysis database cache falls back to an empty cache when the persisted database is unreadable
workspace analysis database cache clears persisted analysis rows without deleting repo-local settings files
extension/pipeline/database/cacheWriteStatements sorts cache entries by file path
extension/pipeline/database/cacheWriteStatements persists file, symbol, and relation statements in order
extension/pipeline/database/cacheWriteStatements skips symbol and relation writes when the analysis omits them
pipeline/database/cacheRowValues parses optional JSON strings and drops nullish or empty values
pipeline/database/cacheRowValues returns optional strings only for non-empty string values
pipeline/database/cacheRowValues returns required strings only for string values
pipeline/database/cacheRowValues reads optional numbers from numbers and bigints only
extension/pipeline/database/cacheLoad returns an empty cache when the database file does not exist
extension/pipeline/database/cacheLoad loads readable rows, skips empty entries, and warns for unreadable rows
extension/pipeline/database/cacheLoad clears broken database artifacts and falls back to an empty cache when the database read fails
extension/pipeline/database/cacheFileEntry creates a snapshot entry from valid persisted values
extension/pipeline/database/cacheFileEntry defaults missing mtimes to zero and drops non-numeric sizes
extension/pipeline/database/cacheFileEntry returns undefined when required persisted values are missing
extension/pipeline/database/cacheFileEntry throws when persisted analysis JSON is malformed
pipeline/database/cacheConnection closes every query result returned by runStatementSync
pipeline/database/cacheConnection reads rows from the first query result and still closes every result
pipeline/database/cacheConnection returns an empty array when rows cannot be read and still closes the result
pipeline/database/cacheConnection tolerates missing query results when closing statements and reading rows
pipeline/database/cacheConnection best-effort closes query results even when close throws
pipeline/database/cacheConnection initializes the database, ensures the schema, runs the callback, and closes resources
pipeline/database/cacheConnection closes the connection and database when the callback throws
pipeline/database/cacheSymbolEntry returns undefined when the required symbolId field is missing
pipeline/database/cacheSymbolEntry returns undefined when the required filePath field is missing
pipeline/database/cacheSymbolEntry returns undefined when the required name field is missing
pipeline/database/cacheSymbolEntry returns undefined when the required kind field is missing
pipeline/database/cacheSymbolEntry builds a symbol entry from required and optional row values
pipeline/database/cachePaths creates the database directory only when the workspace root exists
pipeline/database/cachePaths builds the repo-local analysis database path
pipeline/database/cachePaths clears the database and wal artifacts with best-effort error handling
pipeline/database/cacheRelationEntry returns undefined when the required filePath field is missing
pipeline/database/cacheRelationEntry returns undefined when the required kind field is missing
pipeline/database/cacheRelationEntry returns undefined when the required sourceId field is missing
pipeline/database/cacheRelationEntry returns undefined when the required fromFilePath field is missing
pipeline/database/cacheRelationEntry builds a relation entry from required and optional row values
pipeline/database/cacheSnapshot returns an empty snapshot when the repo-local database does not exist
pipeline/database/cacheSnapshot reads rows through the database connection and drops invalid snapshot entries
pipeline/database/cacheSnapshot warns and falls back to an empty snapshot when reading the database fails
pipeline/database/cacheRelationIdentityProperties builds deterministic quoted identity properties for relations
pipeline/database/cacheRelationIdentityProperties uses empty placeholders for missing optional relation identity fields
